description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a sprawling, angular footprint and a dark, multi-faceted hip roof. The exterior features a mix of white and natural stone walls, with large glass windows and sliding doors that provide ample natural light. The front of the house includes a covered entryway with a wooden overhang and a driveway leading to a garage. The backyard is enclosed by a fence and features a paved patio area, landscaped with shrubs and small trees. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a manicured lawn and a stone pathway leading to the main entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and contemporary materials.
description: A modern, single-story house with a dark hip roof, stone and white walls, large windows, and a landscaped yard with a fenced backyard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular roof, large windows, and a spacious lawn with a partial view of the driveway and garage.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway with a wooden overhang, driveway, garage, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the long white wall, glass-covered patio, and the full extent of the fenced backyard.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring the paved patio, large glass doors, and the enclosed backyard with landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a wooden overhang, stone steps, and a modern door adjacent to the garage
